raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.3,"R1.2":1.0,"R1.3":1.0,"R1.4":0.0,"R1.5":0.3,"R1.6":0.3,"R1.7":0.0,"RX.1":0.7,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":0.7,"RX.5":0.7},"active_set":["R1.2","R1.3","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":false,"clarification_question":"","rationale":{"R1.2":"The delegation centrally requires checking whether the artifact's argument is internally consistent, especially where conclusions about all six regions conflict with reported divergent cases and exclusions.","R1.3":"The delegation centrally requires checking whether the headline claims about predictive skill and regional agreement are supported by the reported model-spread results.","RX.1":"Any projection of responsibility should account for uncertainty because the artifact involves probabilistic climate-model interpretation and contested meanings of predictive skill.","RX.2":"Overclaim avoidance is load-bearing because the artifact makes strong planning and physical-process claims from inter-model agreement metrics.","RX.3":"Scope adherence is load-bearing because the delegation is only to check the artifact, not to rewrite it or perform an external climate-model audit.","RX.4":"Downstream-harm avoidance is active because unsupported confidence in regional precipitation projections could affect adaptation-planning decisions.","RX.5":"Provenance and traceability is active because any check should remain grounded in the artifact's stated regions, metrics, and reported numerical results."}}

rationale.R1.2: The delegation centrally requires checking whether the artifact's argument is internally consistent, especially where conclusions about all six regions conflict with reported divergent cases and exclusions.
rationale.R1.3: The delegation centrally requires checking whether the headline claims about predictive skill and regional agreement are supported by the reported model-spread results.
rationale.RX.1: Any projection of responsibility should account for uncertainty because the artifact involves probabilistic climate-model interpretation and contested meanings of predictive skill.
rationale.RX.2: Overclaim avoidance is load-bearing because the artifact makes strong planning and physical-process claims from inter-model agreement metrics.
rationale.RX.3: Scope adherence is load-bearing because the delegation is only to check the artifact, not to rewrite it or perform an external climate-model audit.
rationale.RX.4: Downstream-harm avoidance is active because unsupported confidence in regional precipitation projections could affect adaptation-planning decisions.
rationale.RX.5: Provenance and traceability is active because any check should remain grounded in the artifact's stated regions, metrics, and reported numerical results.
